name: Add 'Give Kudos' button to 'Group Activity'
description: Adds a button that triggers the same action as shaking your phone would.

name: Add media download
description: Extends the full-screen media viewer menu with items to copy or open their URLs or download them directly.

name: Always allow deep-linking
description: Open Amazon links, even if the app is not set to handle Amazon links.

name: Auto claim channel points
description: Automatically claim Channel Points.

name: Block audio ads
description: Blocks audio ads in streams and VODs.

name: Block embedded ads
description: Blocks embedded stream ads using services like Luminous or PurpleAdBlocker.

name: Block Snowplow tracking
description: Blocks Snowplow analytics. See https://snowplow.io for more information.

name: Block video ads
description: Blocks video ads in streams and VODs.

name: Bypass login
description: Allows the use of the app after its discontinuation.

name: Change package name
description: Appends ".morphe" to the package name by default. Changing the package name of the app can lead to unexpected issues. This patch does not work with Reddit.

options.title: Package name
options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.

options.title: Update permissions
options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update providers
options.description: Update provider names declared by the app. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

name: Debug mode
description: Enables Twitch's internal debugging mode.

name: Disable Ad-Free Banner
description: Disables the banner with a frog, prompting you to buy Tumblr Ad-Free.

name: Disable blog notification reminder
description: Disables the reminder to enable notifications for blogs you visit.

name: Disable dashboard ads
description: Disables ads in the dashboard.

name: Disable gift message popup
description: Disables the popup suggesting to buy TumblrMart items for other people.

name: Disable in-app update
description: Disables the in-app update check and update prompt.

name: Disable login requirement
description: Disables mandatory login for TikTok. (Supports TikTok 43.6.2 + 43.8.3.)

name: Disable Quick Edit
description: Prevents the Quick Edit prompt from popping up.

name: Disable telemetry
description: Disables SoundCloud's telemetry system.

name: Disable Tumblr TV
description: Removes the Tumblr TV navigation button from the bottom navigation bar.

name: Disable typing indicator
description: Disables the indicator while typing a message.

name: Downloads
description: Removes download restrictions and changes the default download path. (Supports TikTok 43.6.2 + 43.8.3.)

name: Enable CustomTabs
description: Enables CustomTabs to open articles in your default browser.

name: Enable DCIM folders backup control
description: Disables always on backup for the Camera and other DCIM folders, allowing you to control backup for each folder individually. This will make the app default to having no folders backed up.

name: Enable Open Debug
description: Re-enables the hidden "Open debug" entry. Supported on TikTok 43.6.2 only. (Not compatible with 43.8.3.)

name: Enable password login
description: Re-enables password login after having used an OTP code.

name: Feed filter
description: Removes ads, livestreams, stories, image videos and videos with a specific amount of views or likes from the feed. (Supports TikTok 43.6.2 + 43.8.3.)

name: Fix Google login
description: Allows logging in with a Google account. (Supports TikTok 43.6.2 + 43.8.3.)

name: Fix old versions
description: Fixes old versions of the app (v33.2 and earlier) breaking due to Tumblr removing remnants of Tumblr Live from the API, which causes many requests to fail. This patch has no effect on newer versions of the app.

name: Fix selected account persistence
description: Prevents Google Photos from clearing the selected account after cold start when using MicroG.

name: Force enable FreePhone
description: Enables the FreePhone menu in the navigation drawer even on devices that do not support eSIM.

name: GmsCore support
description: Allows the app to work without root by using a different package name when patched using a GmsCore instead of Google Play Services.

name: GmsCore support
description: Allows the app to work without root by using a different package name when patched using a GmsCore instead of Google Play Services.

name: Hide Ads
description: Hides ad banners between chats.

name: Hide ads
description: Hides sponsored ads.

name: Hide ads
description: Hide ads and sponsored articles in list pages and remove pre-roll ads on videos.

name: Hide ads
description: Hides all video ads.

name: Hide ads
description: Hides sponsored content / ads in Threads.

name: Hide distractions
description: Hides elements that are not essential.

options.title: Promotions
options.description: Elements that promote features, challenges, clubs, etc.

options.title: Who to Follow
options.description: Popular athletes, followers, people near you etc.

options.title: Suggested Challenges
options.description: Random challenges Strava wants you to join.

options.title: Activity lookback
options.description: Your activity from X years ago

name: Hide Facebook button
description: Hides the Facebook button in the top toolbar.

name: Hide inbox ads
description: Hides ads in inbox.

name: Hide inbox subtabs
description: Hides Home and Channels tabs between active now tray and chats.

name: Hide navigation buttons
description: Permanently hides navigation bar buttons, such as Explore and Marketplace.

name: Hide OneDrive migration
description: Hides the OneDrive migration prompt when opening Microsoft Office Lens.

name: Hide Premium upgrade button
description: Hides the Premium upgrade button in the navigation drawer.

name: Hide purchase reminder
description: Hides the popup that reminds you to purchase the app.

name: Hide story ads
description: Hides the ads in the Facebook app stories.

name: Hide update popup
description: Prevents the update popup from showing up.

name: Override certificate pinning
description: Overrides certificate pinning, allowing to inspect traffic via a proxy. This patch does not work with Reddit.

name: Overwrite media upload parameters
description: Overwrites the compression, resize and trim media (images and videos) parameters returned by Strava's server before upload.

options.title: Compression quality (percent)
options.description: This is used as the JPEG quality setting (≤ 100).

options.title: Max duration (seconds)
options.description: The maximum length (≤ 3600) of a video before it gets trimmed.

options.title: Max size (pixels)
options.description: The image gets resized so that the smaller dimension (width/height) does not exceed this value (≤ 10000).

name: Playback speed
description: Enables the playback speed option for all videos and retains the speed configurations in between videos. (Supports TikTok 43.6.2 + 43.8.3.)

name: Prevent log upload
description: Avoid uploading logs when the application crashes.

name: Remember clear display
description: Remembers the clear display configurations in between videos. (Supports TikTok 43.6.2 + 43.8.3.)

name: Remove 'Sent from' signature
description: Removes the 'Sent from Proton Mail mobile' signature from emails.

name: Remove device restrictions
description: Removes restrictions from using the app on any device. Requires mounting patched app over original.

name: Remove free accounts limit
description: Removes the limit for maximum free accounts logged in.

name: Remove Meta AI
description: Removes UI elements related to Meta AI.

name: Remove play limits
description: Disables purchase nagging and playback limits of not purchased tracks.

name: Sanitize sharing links
description: Removes tracking parameters from shared links. (Supports TikTok 43.6.2 + 43.8.3.)

name: Settings
description: Adds Morphe settings to TikTok. Supported on 43.6.2 only. (Not compatible with 43.8.3.)

name: Show deleted messages
description: Shows deleted chat messages behind a clickable spoiler.

name: Show K1 token(s)
description: Shows the K1 authentication token(s) in a dialog and logs it to logcat for pairing with GadgetBridge without requiring root access.

name: Show seekbar
description: Shows a progress bar for all videos. (Supports TikTok 43.6.2 + 43.8.3.)

name: Skip ads
description: Skip ads between the tracks.

name: Skip ads
description: Automatically skips ads.

name: Spoof certificate
description: Spoofs the X-Android-Cert header to allow push messages.

name: Spoof device ID
description: Spoofs device ID to mitigate manual bans by developers.

name: Spoof features
description: Spoofs the device to enable Google Pixel exclusive features, including unlimited storage.

options.title: Features to enable
options.description: Google Pixel exclusive features to enable. Features up to Pixel XL enable the unlimited storage feature.

options.title: Features to disable
options.description: Google Pixel exclusive features to disable.Features after Pixel XL may have to be disabled for unlimited storage depending on the device.

name: Unlimited track skipping
description: Unlocks the ability to skip tracks without restriction.

name: Unlock subscription features
description: Unlocks "Routes", "Matched Runs" and "Segment Efforts".

name: Unlock Unlimited
description: Unlock Music Unlimited features.
